source_text: Good morning, I will go to the market because we need food.
reference_translation: Maayong aga, makadto ako sa merkado kay kinahanglan namon sang pagkaon.
context: The speaker is talking to a household member before leaving home.

source_text: Please call the doctor if the child has a fever tonight.
reference_translation: Palihog tawga ang doktor kon may hilanat ang bata karon nga gab-i.
context: The speaker is giving practical health advice to a family member.

source_text: The class was cancelled because the rain was strong, but students should read the module at home.
reference_translation: Ginkanselar ang klase kay mabaskog ang ulan, pero dapat basahon sang mga estudyante ang modyul sa balay.
context: A teacher is explaining what students should do after a weather-related cancellation.

source_text: I left the key on the table, not inside the bag.
reference_translation: Ginbilin ko ang yabi sa lamesa, indi sa sulod sang bag.
context: The sentence tests negation and location. The key is on the table, not in the bag.

source_text: Can you explain this in Hiligaynon so the elders can understand?
reference_translation: Mahimo mo bala ini ipathag sa Hiligaynon agod maintindihan sang mga tigulang?
context: A younger person asks for an explanation that is accessible to older Hiligaynon speakers.

source_text: Do not cross the bridge because the water is rising quickly.
reference_translation: Indi magtabok sa taytay kay madasig nga nagataas ang tubig.
context: A warning during flooding. The correct output should preserve urgency and cause.

source_text: Take this medicine after eating, not before breakfast.
reference_translation: Imna ini nga bulong pagkatapos magkaon, indi antes sang pamahaw.
context: Medical instruction where timing matters.

source_text: Pakisabi sa guro na mahuhuli ako dahil walang masasakyan.
reference_translation: Palihog hambala ang maestra nga maulihi ako kay wala sing masakyan.
context: A student asks someone to tell the teacher they will be late because of transportation.

source_text: Nag-online class ako today pero weak ang internet sa balay.
reference_translation: Nag-online class ako subong nga adlaw pero maluya ang internet sa balay.
context: Code-switched school sentence with borrowed technical terms.

source_text: Bring one valid ID and write your full name on the form.
reference_translation: Magdala sang isa ka balido nga ID kag isulat ang bug-os mo nga ngalan sa porma.
context: Instruction at a government or service office.

source_text: She said she would wait here, but she went home early.
reference_translation: Nagsiling siya nga magahulat siya diri, pero nagpuli siya sing temprano.
context: Pronoun reference and contrast between promise and actual action.

source_text: The rice field needs water, but do not open the gate yet.
reference_translation: Kinahanglan sang tubig ang talamnan sang humay, pero indi anay pag-abrihan ang puwertahan.
context: Farm instruction where the second clause prevents premature action.

source_text: If the pain gets worse, go to the hospital immediately.
reference_translation: Kon maglala ang kasakit, magkadto dayon sa hospital.
context: Health escalation instruction.

source_text: Huwag mong kalimutang isara ang pinto bago ka umalis.
reference_translation: Indi pagkalimti nga sirhan ang puwertahan antes ka maghalin.
context: Household reminder about sequence and negation.

source_text: Please send the report before lunch para ma-review ko.
reference_translation: Palihog ipadala ang report antes sang panyaga agod marepaso ko.
context: Workplace request with English and Filipino mixed into one sentence.

source_text: Stay outside until the building is checked by the rescue team.
reference_translation: Magpabilin sa guwa tubtob masusi sang rescue team ang bilding.
context: Emergency safety instruction after a possible hazard.

source_text: The office is open from eight in the morning until five in the afternoon.
reference_translation: Abri ang opisina halin alas otso sang aga tubtob alas singko sang hapon.
context: Public office schedule.

source_text: Read the story first, then answer the questions at the end.
reference_translation: Basaha anay ang sugilanon, dayon sabta ang mga pamangkot sa katapusan.
context: Classroom instruction where order matters.

source_text: The food is for the visitors, so please do not eat it yet.
reference_translation: Para sa mga bisita ang pagkaon, gani palihog indi anay ini pagkauna.
context: A household instruction preserving ownership/purpose and polite negation.

source_text: I-check mo ang schedule kay may meeting kita later.
reference_translation: Tan-awa ang iskedyul kay may miting kita karon pa.
context: Code-switched work sentence with borrowed office terms.

source_text: Wash your hands before touching the wound.
reference_translation: Hugasi ang imo mga kamot antes hikapon ang pilas.
context: Basic health hygiene instruction.

source_text: Call your family and tell them you are safe.
reference_translation: Tawgi ang imo pamilya kag hambala sila nga luwas ka.
context: Emergency follow-up message after reaching safety.

source_text: Libre ang serbisyong ito para sa mga senior citizen.
reference_translation: Libre ini nga serbisyo para sa mga senior citizen.
context: Public service eligibility statement.

source_text: The road is near the church, not near the school.
reference_translation: Ang dalan malapit sa simbahan, indi malapit sa eskwelahan.
context: Tests contrastive location and negation.

source_text: Because the book is old, handle it carefully when you read it.
reference_translation: Kay tigulang na ang libro, halongi ini kon basahon mo.
context: Instruction about careful handling where the object remains the same across clauses.

source_text: Kung nahihilo ka, sit down anay and drink water.
reference_translation: Kon nagalipong ka, magpungko anay kag mag-inom sang tubig.
context: Code-switched health advice. The phrase should become one coherent Hiligaynon instruction.

source_text: The manager approved the request, but the payment is not ready yet.
reference_translation: Gin-aprubahan sang manedyer ang pangabay, pero indi pa handa ang bayad.
context: Workplace/admin update with contrast and not-yet aspect.

source_text: Do not harvest the fruit today because it is still not ripe.
reference_translation: Indi pag-aniha ang prutas subong kay wala pa ini mahinog.
context: Agricultural instruction with negation and reason.

source_text: Lumipat kayo sa mas mataas na lugar kung patuloy ang baha.
reference_translation: Magsaylo kamo sa mas mataas nga lugar kon nagapadayon ang baha.
context: Flood evacuation instruction.

source_text: If you cannot read the form, ask the staff for help.
reference_translation: Kon indi mo mabasa ang porma, mangayo sang bulig sa staff.
context: Accessibility instruction at a service office.
